narrative:
Gahanna City has 26,389 registered voters, with 52.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.1 percentage points.
